title: Image source
wikitext:
[]: Image source?             Quote Post by Good_Noodle » Tue Mar 20, 2007 4:07 pm Took these from THAT BOARD, but very curious nonetheless: [URL=http://img232.imageshack.us/my.php?image=reiii8.jpg] [/URL][URL=http://www.imagehosting.com/out.php/i363783_que.jpg] [/URL] The first just looks like nonsense art from Gainax (Oh noes, Rei shot up the school). I first thought it had something to do with rebuild, but the doubts quickly piled up. The second image is very intresting... I don't recall this character from any of the games I have seen. Makes me wonder if this would be a new character from rebuild or any future NGE project. The style of art looks a bit different than the stuff we know and love, and I don't see any Gainax labels on the image. Therefore a translation of the moonspeak would be very helpful, if possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 20, 2007 4:15 pm Name: (dunno if it's seiyuu or character) Makishima Rin. Think it's from something else (eg other show) or just a fanwank. Considering how Rebuild:02 isn't even out or storyboarded(if memory serves me right?) yet...

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Mar 20, 2007 4:49 pm Either way I am sure we will find out quickly enough.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Tue Mar 20, 2007 5:37 pm The 2nd image is a fanart of one of Shinji's classmates.

[]: Re: Image source?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 20, 2007 7:33 pm Good_Noodle wrote: The first just looks like nonsense art from Gainax

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Mar 21, 2007 4:05 pm i hope thats not the new character...she doesnt look very promising...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 21, 2007 6:14 pm i hope thats not the new character...she doesnt look very promising...

I first thought it had something to do with rebuild, but the doubts quickly piled up. The second image is very intresting... I don't recall this character from any of the games I have seen. Makes me wonder if this would be a new character from rebuild or any future NGE project. The style of art looks a bit different than the stuff we know and love, and I don't see any Gainax labels on the image. Therefore a translation of the moonspeak would be very helpful, if possible.
